devdoc.details: Provides information about the current execution context, including the sender of the transaction and its data. While these are generally available via msg.sender and msg.data, they should not be accessed directly in case meta-transactions are used.

devdoc.details: Provides a basic access control mechanism, where there is an account (an owner) that can be granted exclusive access to specific functions. By default, the owner account will be the one that deploys the contract. This can later be changed with {transferOwnership}.

constructor.details: Initializes the contract setting the deployer as the initial owner.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

documentation.text:
@dev Provides information about the current execution context, including
 the sender of the transaction and its data. While these are generally
 available via msg.sender and msg.data, they should not be accessed directly
 in case meta-transactions are used.

@dev Provides a basic access control mechanism, where
 there is an account (an owner) that can be granted exclusive
 access to specific functions.
 By default, the owner account will be the one that deploys the contract.
 This can later be changed with {transferOwnership}.

typeDescriptions.typeString: literal_string "Ownable: new owner is the zero address"

arguments.value: Ownable: new owner is the zero address

argumentTypes.typeString: literal_string "Ownable: new owner is the zero address"

documentation.text: @dev Initializes the contract setting the deployer as the initial owner.
@dev Returns the address of the current owner.

typeDescriptions.typeString: literal_string "Ownable: caller is not the owner"

arguments.value: Ownable: caller is not the owner

argumentTypes.typeString: literal_string "Ownable: caller is not the owner"

documentation.text: @dev Throws if called by any account other than the owner.

typeDescriptions.typeString: literal_string "Ownable: new owner is the zero address"

arguments.value: Ownable: new owner is the zero address

argumentTypes.typeString: literal_string "Ownable: new owner is the zero address"

documentation.text:
@dev Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`).
 Can only be called by the current owner.
